_README: Pre-stubbed structured takeoff for B1710 Office Refurbishment. Quantities are SOW-stated where given (3,500 SF flooring) and estimator-derived where inferred (paint SF, LF base, etc.). All quantities marked `verified: false` need field verification or scale-from-plan verification before the price proposal lands. The estimator updates `quantity` and `verified` per row as work progresses Wed PM through Thu PM (Gate 2 in 01-bid-prep-checklist.md).

project.site: Building 1710, NAS JRB Fort Worth, TX 76127
project.davis_bacon_wd: TX20260270 Mod 0 (02 Jan 2026, Tarrant Co Building)

line_items.description: Selective demolition: existing carpet + flooring removal across identified C/B/P areas; furniture relocate (move + restore at completion) per SOW §A and §3.1.2
line_items.notes: 5% contingency applied at price-proposal level, not here. Furniture move overhead built into general conditions.

line_items.description: Dispose all furniture + material in Room 1008 per SOW §E
line_items.notes: Allowance; field-verify volume at NTP. Assumes ~1 CY of furniture + material; pack-out + haul-off in 1 day for 2-person crew.

line_items.description: Construction debris disposal at certified landfill per SOW §A. Roll-off dumpster, ~10 CY total volume (demo carpet + Rm 1008 contents + drywall + base scraps).
line_items.quantity_source: Estimator derived from demo + Rm 1008 pack-out
line_items.notes: Tarrant Co tipping fee + haul; cost per CY

line_items.description: Furnish + install carpet tile, 24"x24", 100% Nylon. Shaw Constellat EW24, Style 59326, Color 26110 Moonlight Grade A, Dye Lot H6958 (or accepted equal per SOW §B). Glue-down release adhesive.
line_items.notes: Range from 09-price-references.md §1. Includes material + adhesive + install. Floor leveler separate (line 05).

line_items.description: Self-leveling cementitious underlayment, 1/8" average depth, on slab where required per SOW intro ('level flooring before new carpet squares are placed').
line_items.quantity_source: Estimator allowance (~10-15% of carpet area; field-verify after demo)
line_items.notes: Allowance — actual coverage TBD after demo exposes slab condition. If <5% needs leveler, drop to 200 SF; if >15%, escalate via Differing Site Conditions claim.

line_items.description: Rubber cove base, 6" tall, gray (color from samples per SOW §B). Roppe / Johnsonite / Burke Mercer commercial grade. Installed with cove-base cement.
line_items.quantity_source: Estimator perimeter calc (16 rooms × ~70 LF avg + hallway segments + Rm 1030 new wall)

line_items.description: Interior paint, walls. Surface prep (patch/fill holes, sand, caulk, mask) + 1 coat primer (where bare/repair) + 2 coats finish in eggshell. Color: 'Agreeable Gray' (Sherwin-Williams SW 7029 or color-matched equivalent per SOW §C).
line_items.quantity_source: Estimator wall-area derivation (~3.5 SF wall per SF floor × 3,500 SF floor + hallway)
line_items.notes: RFI item: confirm SW 7029 specifically. Volatile quantity — see 09-price-references.md §3 for the 3-scenario sensitivity analysis.

line_items.description: Sheetrock-in existing door opening in Room 1030 to make full-length wall. Includes metal-stud framing (3-5/8" or 6", 16" o.c.) + 5/8" GWB Type X both sides + tape/bed/texture + prime + 2 coats finish paint to match Item 07. Per SOW §D.
line_items.notes: Texture: orange peel or knockdown to match adjacent (field-verify); RFI item if site walk offered. ~42 SF GWB total, ~7 LF metal stud.

line_items.description: Wall damage repair in Room 1008. ~16 SF GWB patch + tape/bed/texture/prime/paint to match adjacent. Per SOW §F.
line_items.notes: Allowance; actual patch SF TBD at field-verify.

line_items.description: Install 12"x12" steel-frame plaster-bead access panel, valve-rated, for exposed valve in Room 1008. Karp DSB-214M or Acudor equal. Per SOW §F.
line_items.notes: Verify valve type + size at field-verify to select correct panel size. May need 12"x18" if valve is larger.

line_items.description: Furniture move + restore. Existing furniture in 16 rooms; relocate as needed for floor / paint work; restore to original or designated locations per SOW §A and intro.
line_items.notes: 2-person crew × ~3-4 working days; rolling 4-room-batch coordination per schedule narrative.

line_items.description: General conditions: PM supervision, site superintendent, base-access coordination, daily cleanup, dumpster management, certified-payroll admin (Davis-Bacon WH-347 weekly), QC, safety, mobilization + demobilization (×2), final cleanup, punch-list.
line_items.notes: See 09-price-references.md §5 build-up. Includes 90-cal-day PoP supervision + 13 weeks DBA certified-payroll admin.

line_items.description: Overhead + Profit (10% + 10% = 20%) on direct cost subtotal.
line_items.notes: Applied at proposal-roll-up time, not here.

line_items.description: Quantity contingency — 5% on direct cost — for no-site-walk quantity-variance exposure per 07-risk-register.md R2.
line_items.notes: Applied at proposal-roll-up time, on direct cost (not on OH/P).
